creator: kris@FreeBSD.org
text:
Ivan Kalugin wrote:

> I try to install libiconv-1.12 on several systems (i386, amd64). The type of FreeBSD installation is "minimal".
> 
> ./configure
> make
> make install
> 
> Every step is ok. But next root login failed. System show welcome screen and login repeat.

Sounds like you overwrote a critical part of your system by accident. 
Ask on the freebsd-questions mailing list if you need help to recover -- 
but make sure to give much more detail about exactly what is going 
wrong.  As it stands you haven't given enough details for anyone to help 
you.

Kris
